name: elasticflow
description: AI-native team workspace where agents and humans collaborate. Manage tables, documents, files, and publish live dashboards — all within your team's shared workspace.

http.description: Streamable HTTP endpoint with OAuth 2.1 (PKCE). No API key required.

examples.title: Build a sales pipeline table
examples.description: Create a structured table for tracking deals.
examples.prompt: Create a table called Pipeline with columns: company, deal size, stage, close date, owner

examples.title: Publish a client dashboard
examples.description: Build and publish a live dashboard without code.
examples.prompt: Build a client-facing dashboard showing project milestones for Acme Corp and publish it

examples.title: Search contracts
examples.description: Find information across all team documents.
examples.prompt: Search documents for all mentions of indemnification clause
